zh.lifeSummary: 當Gruffydd ap Llywelyn Fawr於大約1196年出生在威爾士丹比爾丹比時，他的父親Llywelyn ab Iorwerth23歲，母親Tangwystl ferch Llywarch Goch22歲。他於1222年與Senana ferch Caradog結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1244年3月1日在英國倫敦享年49歲，埋葬在英國威爾斯尼德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gruffydd ap Llywelyn Fawr于大约1196年出生在威尔士丹比爾丹比时，他的父亲Llywelyn ab Iorwerth23岁，母亲Tangwystl ferch Llywarch Goch22岁。他于1222年与Senana ferch Caradog结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1244年3月1日在英国倫敦享年49岁，埋葬在英国威尔斯尼德。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: occupational name for a cobbler.
Slovenian: nickname for a talkative person, from lapati ‘to babble’, or a topographic name from dialect lap ‘abyss’. Compare Lapp 4.

variants.name: Lapp
meanings: German, English, and Dutch: from Middle High German and Middle English lappe, Middle Dutch lap ‘cloth, patch, rag’, a metonymic occupational name for a mender of clothes or shoes, or a nickname given to someone who wore ragged clothes or garments with loose folds, flaps, or hanging sleeves, or who had fleshy folds of skin on his face, neck, or body.

German: nickname for a simple-minded person, from Middle Low German lappe ‘fool’. This surname (in any of the two possible senses; see also 1 above) is also found in France (mainly Alsace, also Lorraine).
English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French lappe ‘burdock’, perhaps for someone with a prickly character.

nameMeanings.name: Llywelyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Llewellyn
meanings: Welsh: from the personal name Llywelyn, derived from British Celtic Lugubelinos, itself from the divine name Lugus + an uncertain second element often used alone as a name. Through association with llew ‘lion’, it was altered to Llewelyn. This was the name of two princes of north Wales who held the Normans at bay for many years in the 13th century. Etymologically speaking, the form with a fourth -l- is an error, not found as an original Welsh name, but this is now much the most common spelling in the US.

nameMeanings.name: Gruffydd
meanings: Welsh: The Welsh name; from creffydd, strong faith, or strong in faith. Gruffydd, a Welsh form of Gryffydd.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Gruffydd ap Llywelyn Fawr was born about 1196, in Denbigh, Denbighshire, Wales, his father, Llywelyn ab Iorwerth, was 23 and his mother, Tangwystl ferch Llywarch Goch, was 22. He married Senana ferch Caradog in 1222. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 1 March 1244, in London, England, at the age of 49, and was buried in Gwynedd, Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gruffydd ap Llywelyn Fawr est né environ 1196, à Denbigh, Denbighshire, Galles, son père, Llywelyn ab Iorwerth, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Tangwystl ferch Llywarch Goch, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Senana ferch Caradog en 1222. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 1 mars 1244, à Londres, Angleterre, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterré à Gwynedd, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gruffydd ap Llywelyn Fawr um 1196 in Denbigh, Denbighshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Llywelyn ab Iorwerth 23 und seine Mutter Tangwystl ferch Llywarch Goch 22. Er hat 1222 Senana ferch Caradog geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 1. März 1244 im Alter von 49 Jahren in London, England und wurde in Gwynedd, Wales, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gruffydd ap Llywelyn Fawr è nato il circa 1196 nel Denbigh, Denbighshire, Galles, il suo padre, Llywelyn ab Iorwerth, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Tangwystl ferch Llywarch Goch, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Senana ferch Caradog nel 1222. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 1 marzo 1244, nel London, England, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolto a Gwynedd, Galles, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Gruffydd ap Llywelyn Fawrが約1196年にウェールズデンビグhシュアイアデンビグで生まれた時，父Llywelyn ab Iorwerthは23歳，母Tangwystl ferch Llywarch Gochは22歳であった。1222年にSenana ferch Caradogと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1244年3月1日にイギリスロンドンで49歳で死去し，イギリスウェールズグウイネッドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Gruffydd ap Llywelyn Fawr(이)가 대략 1196년 웨일스 덴비그h실르 덴비그h에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Llywelyn ab Iorwerth(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Tangwystl ferch Llywarch Goch(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1222년 Senana ferch Caradog(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1244년 3월 1일 영국 런던에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 웨일스 그윈드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gruffydd ap Llywelyn Fawr nasceu aproximadamente 1196, em Denbigh, Denbighshire, Gales, seu pai, Llywelyn ab Iorwerth, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Tangwystl ferch Llywarch Goch, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Senana ferch Caradog em 1222. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1 de março de 1244, em London, Inglaterra, com 49 anos, e foi sepultado em Gwynedd, Gales, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gruffydd ap Llywelyn Fawr родился около 1196 г. в местности денбаи, денбаишир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Llywelyn ab Iorwerth было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Tangwystl ferch Llywarch Goch, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Senana ferch Caradog в 1222 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 1 марта 1244 г. в местности Лондон, Англия в возрасте 49 лет и был похоронен в местности гвинедд, Уэльс, Великобритания.

es.Anglesey, Anglesey, Wales, United Kingdo: Anglesey, Isla Oscura, Gales, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gruffydd ap Llywelyn Fawr nació aproximadamente 1196, en Denbigh, Denbighshire, Gales, su papá, Llywelyn ab Iorwerth, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Tangwystl ferch Llywarch Goch, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Senana ferch Caradog en 1222. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 1 de marzo de 1244, en London, Inglaterra, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultado en Gwynedd, Gales, Reino Unido.
